label: Pre-Match
message: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is about to begin. Please find your seats.

label: Kickoff!
message: Kickoff! The match has begun. Enjoy the game!

label: 1st Half
message: 32nd minute — the match is in full flow.

label: Half Time
message: Half time. Concessions and facilities are available — gates remain open.

label: 2nd Half
message: 67th minute — we're in the second half. Stay in your seats.

label: Full Time!
message: Full time! Thank you for attending the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final. Please follow exit guidance.
